characters.Name: Aetherion, Super Saiyan 5 Eternal Sovereign (Legends Limited)
characters.Sprite_Prompt: 2D anime game sprite, Dragon Ball Legends style: AF Titan 001 — charging galick pose. Glowing ultra god ki aura, white transparent background, no text, game-ready.
characters.Move1_Desc: A collapsing beam of sovereign ki that shreds guard.
characters.Move2_Desc: A purifying lance of infinite range.
characters.Move3_Desc: Stellar rings detonate in chained novas.
characters.Move4_Desc: Reality rewrites in your favor — apocalyptic finisher.

characters.Name: Zorvath, Super Saiyan 5 Reality Ender
characters.Sprite_Prompt: 2D anime game sprite, Dragon Ball Legends style: AF Titan 002 — legendary finisher. Glowing crimson ki aura, white transparent background, no text, game-ready.
characters.Move1_Desc: A cannon of pure void that deletes cover.
characters.Move2_Desc: A blitz of tyrant fists and afterimages.
characters.Move3_Desc: A roar that cracks space into lethal shards.
characters.Move4_Desc: A terminal eclipse that ends the exchange.

characters.Name: Lumina, Super Saiyan 5 Genesis Angel

characters.Move2_Desc: Fires a thin piercing beam. High accuracy.
characters.Move3_Desc: Signature combo that pierces guard at high ki.
